name: AI-accelerated End-to-End Framework for Rapid Professional Upskilling
summary: arXiv:2607.14044v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: By 2030, 59 of every 100 workers will need reskilling or upskilling, yet the average time to close an enterprise skills gap grew from roughly 3 days...
description: arXiv:2607.14044v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: By 2030, 59 of every 100 workers will need reskilling or upskilling, yet the average time to close an enterprise skills gap grew from roughly 3 days in 2014 to 36 days in 2018. Most current frameworks accelerate single stages of upskilling programs and generally lack industry validation. We present an end-to-end framework that applies AI accelerat...
author: Tam Nguyen, Hung Nguyen, Robert Ogburn
